task_completion.description: Set the global default for autoplay to block all audio and video.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Tor Browser Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Autoplay settings, the 'Default for all websites' dropdown is set to 'Block Audio and Video'.

task_completion.description: Explicitly allow media autoplay for https://commons.wikimedia.org/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autoplay Exceptions list (Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Autoplay -> Settings...), there is an entry for 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/' with the status set to 'Allow Audio and Video'.

task_completion.description: Explicitly allow media autoplay for https://archive.org/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Autoplay Exceptions list (Settings -> Privacy & Security -> Autoplay -> Settings...), there is an entry for 'https://archive.org/' with the status set to 'Allow Audio and Video'.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark folder named 'Trusted Archives'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bookmarks menu, Bookmarks toolbar, or Library window shows a folder explicitly named 'Trusted Archives'.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark for 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/' titled 'Wikimedia Commons' inside the 'Trusted Archives' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Trusted Archives' folder, there is a bookmark titled 'Wikimedia Commons'. The URL (visible in the edit bookmark dialog, properties, or tooltip) must be 'https://commons.wikimedia.org/'.

task_completion.description: Create a bookmark for 'https://archive.org/' titled 'Internet Archive' inside the 'Trusted Archives' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Trusted Archives' folder, there is a bookmark titled 'Internet Archive'. The URL (visible in the edit bookmark dialog, properties, or tooltip) must be 'https://archive.org/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Tor Browser GUI to configure settings and bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Tor Browser interface (Settings tabs, Bookmark manager/Library) rather than terminal windows editing configuration files like prefs.js or places.sqlite.

integrity.description: Settings were modified in the actual browser application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Autoplay settings and exceptions are visible within the standard Tor Browser preferences window, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Bookmarks were created using the browser's bookmarking system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Trusted Archives' folder and its contents are shown in the Tor Browser's native Bookmarks Toolbar, Bookmarks Menu, or Library window.
